tasks.title: Aparecida Barroca | Camiseta Oversized Premium
tasks.garment: Off-White heavyweight premium oversized T-shirt, boxy silhouette, dropped shoulders and long wide sleeves
notes: SCALE LOCK BY EMPTY SPACE: the print is SMALL and sits HIGH on the back. The bottom edge of the print (the NIMBUS signature) ends at 56 percent of the shirt length; the ENTIRE LOWER 40 PERCENT of the shirt is EMPTY off-white fabric with nothing printed on it. The print never reaches near the hem. When uncertain, make the print even smaller

TEXT LOCK: the cartouche has exactly two lines, "PADROEIRA" and "(BRASIL SACRO)" with parentheses, copied letter by letter from the artwork; above the NIMBUS signature only a thin halo line, no oval seal

notes: ART LOCK: the artwork is EXACTLY the one shown in the approved-photo reference and in the artwork file: Sao Jorge RIDING a rearing white horse in dark armor with a red-plumed helmet, a HUGE RED dragon filling the lower third and breaking OUT of the frame, gold rococo frame as the OUTER layer with blue azulejo border INSIDE it, golden monochrome cherubs holding the NIMBUS cartouche, passionflowers in the corners, dark green background with a chapel.
